Notice Of Motion And Motion Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories From Plaintiff Alexandre Sandor And Request For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp 2030.290 (C)
Off Calendar Sep-21-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Lesley L. Novotny for defendant and moving party: Ramirez Developers DBA Pacific Cement Corporation

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Ramirez Developers motion to compel responses to form interrogatories: GRANTED.
No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $236.30 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion And Motion Compelling Responses To Request For Production Of Documents From Plaintiff Alexandre Sandor And Request For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp 2030.300 (C)
Off Calendar Sep-21-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Lesley L. Novotny for defendant and moving party: Ramirez Developers DBA Pacific Cement Corporation

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Ramirez Developers motion to compel responses to request for production of documents: GRANTED.
No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve verified responses without objection and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $236.30 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
